title: Driver approval queue
description: Admin can review and approve/reject pending driver registrations.

subtasks.title: GET /api/admin/drivers/pending
subtasks.description: Returns all users with role=driver and status=pending.

subtasks.title: PATCH /api/admin/drivers/:id/approve
subtasks.description: Sets isApproved=true, status='active'. Optionally triggers a notification to the driver.

subtasks.title: PATCH /api/admin/drivers/:id/reject
subtasks.description: Sets status='rejected' with optional reason field.

subtasks.title: Admin UI table
subtasks.description: List pending drivers with license/org details and Approve/Reject buttons.
